zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom於1123年8月18日出生在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯時，他的父親Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom30歲，母親Alice Woodward34歲。他於1144年之前與Emma FitzReinfrid在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1185年在英國越可爾享年62歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom于1123年8月18日出生在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯时，他的父亲Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom30岁，母亲Alice Woodward34岁。他于1144年之前与Emma FitzReinfrid在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1185年在英国越可爾享年62岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lathom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Latham
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom was born on 18 August 1123, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, his father, Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom, was 30 and his mother, Alice Woodward, was 34. He married Emma FitzReinfrid before 1144, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1185, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom est né le 18 août 1123, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Woodward, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Emma FitzReinfrid avant 1144, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1185, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom am 18. August 1123 in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom 30 und seine Mutter Alice Woodward 34. Er hat vor 1144 in England Emma FitzReinfrid geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1185 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom è nato il il 18 agosto 1123 nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice Woodward, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Emma FitzReinfrid prima del 1144, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1185, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathomが1123年8月18日にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで生まれた時，父Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathomは30歳，母Alice Woodwardは34歳であった。1144年以前にイギリスでEmma FitzReinfridと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1185年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで62歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom(이)가 1123년 8월 18일 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Woodward(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1144년 이전 영국에서 Emma FitzReinfrid(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1185년 영국 요르크실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에 묻혔다.

mn.Lathom, Lancashire, England: Lathom, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom nasceu em 18 de agosto de 1123, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Woodward, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma FitzReinfrid antes 1144, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1185, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom родился 18 августа 1123 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Woodward, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma FitzReinfrid перед 1144 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1185 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom nació el 18 de agosto de 1123, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice Woodward, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Emma FitzReinfrid antes de 1144, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1185, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
